sections.heading: Overall Store Trend
sections.body: Average monthly revenue is roughly flat 3.0% year-on-year: $131,192/mo in 2026 YTD vs $135,215/mo across all of 2025. Looking back further, the store was declining from H2 2024 into 2025 (-14.9% monthly average). 2026 YTD total: $439,641 across 3.4 months | 2025 full year: $1,621,471 | H2 2024: $960,476.

sections.heading: Category Shifts (2026 vs 2025)
sections.body: Growing: Unknown (+78%), Canadian Whisky (+77%), Whiskey (+48%). Declining: Rum (-65%), Brandy (-62%), Japanese Whisky (-50%).

sections.heading: Top Revenue Gainers (2026 vs 2025)
sections.body: Penfolds B389 Gift Pack 750ml +522% ($51 → $316/mo) | Coronita Extra Bt 210ml +506% ($108 → $652/mo) | THREE OAKS CIDER 10% 10PK375ML +437% ($110 → $590/mo) | Jacobs Creek Classic Shiraz Cabernet 750ml +342% ($90 → $396/mo)

sections.heading: Top Revenue Declines (2026 vs 2025)
sections.body: Muhak Good Day Scarlett Soju Grapefruit Btl 360ml -104% ($78 → $-3/mo) | Muhak Good Day Soju Watermelon Bt 360ml -100% ($53 → $-0/mo) | Johnnie Walker Blue LNY Snake 2025 750ml -100% ($458 → $0/mo) | Martell LNY 2025 Cordon Bleu 750ml -100% ($366 → $0/mo)

sections.heading: New in 2026 (34 items)
sections.body: Hennessy XO Year of the Horse 750ml ($594/mo), Martell Blue Swift Gift Pack 700ml ($589/mo), Martell Cordon Bleu LNY 2026 Gift Pack 700ml ($269/mo), Real Beast Bourbon 700ml ($151/mo), Greenside Tasmanian Vodka 1L ($149/mo), Hellraiser Bourbon and Cola 375ml 6.5% ($114/mo)

sections.heading: Absent from 2026 So Far (82 items)
sections.body: Johnnie Walker Blue LNY Snake 2025 750ml, Martell LNY 2025 Cordon Bleu 750ml, Mercury Blackcurrant Cider Can 375ml, Macallan 18YO Double Cask 700ml, Macallan Rare Cask 700ml, Penfolds B389 Cab Shiraz 2019 750ml, Wyndham Est Bin 999 Merlot 750ml, Martell Blue Swift LNY 2025 Gift Box 700ml. Consider whether seasonal or permanently dropped.
